chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-916 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For non prosecution. ------ 17.09.2025 Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General, Sindh a/w SIP Ali Dost, SIP Gada Hussain, ASI Deedar Ali and ASI Allah Wasayo Chanwan. ------ Though the petitioner has not deposited the requisite sets as well as cost in this petition and that’s why the office has listed it for non prosecution; however, the officials, present, file their respective statements, taken on record. Mr. Abdul Rehman A. Bhutto, advocate by effecting his presence holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Ali Pirzada, counsel for the petitioner under the instructions submits that he does not wish to press this petition as the alleged detenue has been surfaced through F.I.R. No.10/2025, registered with Police Station Muhammad Pur Odho, District Jacobabad; hence purpose of filing of instant petition has been served. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge Manzoor
